engine.name: GameEngine
engine.stageCompletion: 100% for the current core-first-mvp scope; not a commercial-engine completion claim.
stageClosureNotes: MVP closure is validated through the source-tree default build/test/agent contract plus documented optional desktop runtime and package lanes.
Apple/iOS/Metal validation remains host-gated and is not counted as complete without macOS/Xcode or CI evidence.
Generated-game, sample-game, desktop runtime, and desktop package readiness are limited to the validation recipes listed in this manifest.

languagePolicy.msvcIncrementalLinking: Disabled for linkable targets through MK_apply_common_target_options (/INCREMENTAL:NO) so validation builds do not depend on .ilk state.
languagePolicy.modules: Use CMake FILE_SET CXX_MODULES for project modules.
languagePolicy.importStd: Allowed only when CMake reports C++23 standard-library module support for the active generator/toolchain.
